question: Will the price of Bitcoin be above $70,000 on April 17?

fragility_points: Crypto volatility over a short window.
Potential Binance-specific dislocation or operational issue.
key_assumptions: BTC stays in roughly its recent short-horizon regime over the next ~45 hours.
No exceptional shock pushes Binance BTCUSDT below 70000 by the settlement minute.
Binance pricing remains operationally normal near settlement.
main_logical_chain: The contract settles on Binance BTCUSDT 1-minute close at 12:00 ET on April 17, above 70000 meaning Yes.
Current Binance price is materially above 70000 and recent daily closes are also above 70000.
With only ~45 hours remaining, the base rate favors staying above the strike unless a meaningful selloff occurs.
Therefore Yes is highly likely, but not certain because of exact-minute settlement risk.
payload.main_thesis: BTC is already materially above 70000 on Binance, so the outside view strongly favors a Yes close above 70000 at the specific noon ET settlement minute, though exact-minute volatility keeps a small residual No risk.
quote_anchors: Governing source of truth: Binance BTC/USDT.
The decisive field is the candle’s final Close price.
payload.source_quality_view: High-quality direct sources for both contract mechanics and current price context, with medium-low independence because the narrow case naturally centers on Binance and Polymarket.
strongest_disconfirmers: The contract resolves on one exact Binance 1-minute close at 12:00 ET, so a sharp short-horizon move or wick can still flip the outcome.
A ~6 percent drawdown over two days is not impossible in crypto.
strongest_supports: Binance spot checked around 74340, roughly 4340 above the strike.
Recent Binance daily closes were also above 70000.
Time to resolution is short, limiting the window for a large downside move.
payload.timing_relevance: Settlement is Friday, April 17, 2026 at 12:00 PM EDT, about 45.25 hours after the assignment timestamp used in the run.
unresolved_ambiguities: No major source-of-truth ambiguity remains; the main uncertainty is path volatility into settlement.
payload.what_would_change_view: I would cut the probability if BTC moved back near 70k-71k before Friday, if a macro/crypto shock hit, or if Binance-specific pricing issues emerged near settlement.
